details.resetTips: Confirm restoration to default tracker server. It is irreversible after restoration.
details.trackerTips: When multiple tracker server links exist, please enter them in different lines.
details.trackerTips2: Changes will only apply to newly added tasks.

setting.initTips: Please select the default save path, you can also change this later in the settings.

download.errStatusTips2: Resource file lost or save path not found
download.otherUserInfoTip: Other users' tasks display only partial information
download.abnormalTip: Possible lack of system permission or other system exceptions
download.PleasesearchServerUrl: Please enter the server to connect
download.maximumvalueTip: Should be less than the max value
download.maximumvalueTip2: Should be greater than the min value
download.deleteTip2: Delete the selected item(s) in batches?
download.taskTip1: 1. To respect intellectual property rights and mitigate legal risks, please ensure that you have obtained proper authorization prior to uploading or downloading any protected content. This product only offers the download feature and disclaims all liability for content downloaded by users. By using this feature, you acknowledge and agree to this disclaimer
download.taskTip2: 2. For PT account security, if a download task involves PT resources, please ensure that the tracker site supports qBittorrent 4.6.5 and that the "Peer port number" has been properly mapped to the public network
download.choosefileTip: Please select .torrent or .txt file that contains the download link .
download.defaultsavepathTip: Please configure the default save path first.
download.monitorTip: New files (.torrent, .txt) under the path will automatically be created as download tasks.（Subpaths not included）
download.TimedoutTip: If your task progress is always 0, the task will be set to the task exception state (except pausing and exception state)
download.Limitonconcurrenttasks: Limit on number of concurrent tasks
download.LimitonconcurrenttasksTip: You can use this setting to limit the number of tasks in download. A high number of concurrent tasks will consume more system performance
download.concurrenttasksTip: The total number of tasks downloaded by all users will not exceed this value, and the tasks that are triggered later will be added to the waiting queue.
download.httpTip: The following settings take effect for HTTP and FTP
download.Speedlimitbytimeperiod: Download speed limit by time period
download.Speedlimitbytimeperiod2: Download speed limit by time period
download.Cannotinputsametimeperiod: The same time period cannot be selected
download.StopplantingTip: Stop seeding when any of the following conditions is met
download.StopplantingTip1: Automatically stop seeding when no traffic is available beyond the designated time period.
download.PTtips: If all are unchecked, seeding will be continued all the time. If seeding cannot meet the requirements of the PT station, your PT account may be affected. Please configure it properly
download.placeholderTip: The value ranges from 0 to 999. A maximum of two decimal places are allowed
download.linkAddressTip:
Supported link types: UGREEN NAS sharing links, http, ftp and magnet
Please enter each download link on a separate line. Only one UGREEN NAS sharing link at a time
download.passwordverifiersTip: The links to be added in batches contain encrypted resources. Please add them separately for password verification
download.SkippedInvaliddownloadresources: Skipped invalid or unavailable download link
download.Resourceduplication: Duplicate resource. Unable to redownload it.
download.SkippedduplicateInvalid: Skipped duplicate, invalid, or unsupported download links
download.ResourceExistenceTip1: Resource "{0}" already exists, and redownloading will delete the downloaded content.
download.ResourceExistenceTip2: Resource already exists, and redownloading will delete the downloaded content.
download.ResourceDownloadTips: Resource {0} already {1}, and redownloading will delete the downloaded content.
download.PleaseSelectDate: Please select start and end dates
download.savePrompt: Configuration of the current page has not been saved
download.taskNumLimit: Maximum number of tasks for each add: {0}
download.maxTaskTip: Failed to add download task from the monitored path. Total task limit: 10000
download.maxConcurrentTaskTips: The global maximum number of concurrent tasks should be greater than the maximum number of concurrent tasks per user.
download.upnpnatDes: Selecting this will use your router's UPnP/NAT-PMP port forwarding.
download.oepnBtTip: Enabling this option will improve the download success rate for BT resources but may expose your device's IP and download info to other nodes
download.createTorlimitDes: Seeding not meeting the PT site requirements may affect your account. Please set reasonably
download.torCreateTips: Stop seeding when any of the following conditions are met
download.onlySingleUgreenShareLink: Only one UGREEN NAS sharing link at a time
download.taskNameInvalidFormat: File name cannot start with "._" or use system reserved characters (e.g. "." or "..")
download.zipModeTip: Too many files. Please download them as a compressed archive
download.ugreenLinkDownloadExceedLimit: The link has reached its access limit
download.ugreenLinkSourceNotExist: The source file does not exist
download.zipPackagePauseNotSupportedTip: This task cannot be resumed or paused. To pause, please delete it directly
